features.title: Deployable, scoped, and validated Story draft application
features.description: Repair migration execution, initiator-scoped idempotency, strict Story validation, traceability, and verification for the deterministic Story draft apply flow.
acceptance_criteria: The checked-in migration command applies 0013 and 0014 to empty and verified pre-0013 SQLite databases.
Story application idempotency is scoped to the authenticated initiator and does not disclose another initiator's Goal Space.
A same-initiator application-key unique conflict returns a 200 replay without duplicate domain, audit, or realtime rows.
Every supplied Story field is strictly validated and bounded; invalid input returns INVALID_FIELD and creates no persistent rows.
Accepted output requirements and risk hints are available in immutable audit details.
The browser flow proves an edited draft creates the edited initial Card.
The flow remains deterministic, no-I/O, and non-executing.
definition_of_done: Required tests pass or have documented exceptions
